sections.paragraph:
(“who is like unto God”), Michael, pr.n.-

(1) of one of the seven archangels [?] who interceded for the people of Israel before God, Dan 10:13, 21 Dan 10:21 12:1 .-(2) of a man, 1Ch 27:18.-(3) 2Ch 21:2.-(4) and of others, Num 13:13 1Ch 5:13, 14 1Ch 5:14 6:25 7:3 8:16 12:20 Ezr 8:8.
